channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nearly 250 million children missed school last year because of extreme weather, UNICEF says
item.description: The United Nations Children's Fund says at least 242 million children in 85 countries had their schooling interrupted last year because of heatwaves, cyclones, flooding and other extreme weather.
item.dc:creator: Gerald Imray, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TikTok France is being sued by 7 families. Here’s why
item.description: In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: 3 hidden benefits of Dedicated Internet Access for enterprises
item.description: Reliable Internet connectivity is crucial for businesses to function efficiently and remain competitive in today’s digital world. While standard broadband connections may work for basic tasks, they often struggle to meet the demands of modern businesses.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Dawn of Operator: OpenAI's First AI Agent Takes Flight
item.description: OpenAI has launched its first AI Agent, Operator, designed to complete web tasks for users with ease and efficiency.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: BMC Software survey: IT leaders bullish on generative and agentic AI
item.description: Generative and agentic artificial intelligence (AI) have captured the imagination of IT leaders, but there is a significant gap between enthusiasm and implementation maturity for IT operations and service management, according to a new survey from BMC Software and Dimensional Research.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tips on overcoming the loss of cherished, personal belongings in disasters
item.description: Losing sentimental belongings can be traumatic for those who go through disasters that destroy homes.
item.dc:creator: Julia Rubin, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UK watchdog targets Apple, Google mobile ecosystems with new digital market powers
item.description: Google’s Android and Apple’s iOS are facing fresh scrutiny from Britain’s competition watchdog, which unveiled investigations targeting the two tech giants’ mobile phone ecosystems under new powers to crack down on digital market abuses.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI Faces Copyright Lawsuit in Delhi High Court Over ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's ChatGPT is at the center of a copyright lawsuit filed by ANI, a Reuters-backed Indian news agency, in the Delhi High Court.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to delete Facebook, Instagram and Threads if you don't like Meta's changes
item.description: Some Facebook, Instagram and Threads users are wondering whether to delete their accounts after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg’s announced changes to content rules and plans to its fact-checking program.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to optimize business data for the hybrid cloud
item.description: The benefits of the hybrid cloud are undeniable: optimizing workloads, increasing scalability, making organizations agile.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy S25 phones are—you guessed it—all-in on AI
item.description: Here’s a surprising statistic Samsung uses to explain the overwhelming AI focus in its new Galaxy S25 phones: According to customer surveys, AI features are the second-largest factor in peoples’ purchase decisions.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: MrBeast not quite in the bidding race for TikTok just yet, rep says
item.description: Jimmy Donaldson — better known online as MrBeast — isn't in the TikTok bidding race just yet, according to a representative for the YouTube star. Donaldson stirred interest in a Jan. 13 post on X saying he’d “buy TikTok so it doesn’t get banned.
item.dc:creator: JAMES POLLARD, HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rethinking federal RFPs in the age of data and AI: Why energy efficiency must be part of the equation
item.description: Energy efficiency must become a core criterion in federal IT procurement alongside other key factors like cost, performance and security. The post Rethinking federal RFPs in the age of data and AI: Why energy efficiency must be part of the equation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Why some Instagram users are suddenly following Trump, Vance
item.description: Meta on Wednesday pushed back against claims its platforms were automatically forcing users to follow the Instagram accounts of President Trump and Vice President Vance following Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: It's the latest clash in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI’s board and is now testing Musk’s influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Wisconsin man accused of setting fire to congressman's office over TikTok ban charged with arson
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Prosecutors charged a Wisconsin man who allegedly told police he tried to burn down a congressman's office because he was upset with the federal TikTok ban with multiple counts on Wednesday, including arson.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump’s embrace of meme coin sours mood in crypto industry
item.description: By associating himself so closely with meme coins, some crypto fans worry that Trump hurts his chances to help the wider crypto industry.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: For the first time ever, I wish Google would act more like Amazon
item.description: Fair warning: This isn’t your average article about what’s happening with all the newfangled AI hullabaloo in this weird and wild world of ours.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump open to Elon Musk buying TikTok
item.description: TikTok restored service to U.S. users Sunday afternoon and credited Trump for pushing to keep the app operational.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Auto-followed Trump on Facebook? It's probably because you previously liked the POTUS account
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Some Facebook and Instagram users were surprised to find themselves automatically following the accounts of President Donald Trump or Vice President JD Vance this week after the president was inaugurated — but that's likely because they had previously followed official U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The bitter lesson for generative AI adoption
item.description: The rapid development and improvement in generative AI technology pose a challenge for training and fine-tuning as a sustainable path for adoption. If organizations constantly need to fine-tune new models for specific tasks, they might be in a costly cycle of catching up with new technology.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: These mistakes could tank your credit score
item.description: Even small mistakes can negatively impact your credit score; here are some of the most common credit report errors and how you can fix them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lenovo to acquire Infinidat to expand its storage folio
item.description: Lenovo Group has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tel Aviv-based enterprise storage provider Infinidat, for an undisclosed sum, to expand its storage offerings. The startup provides several offerings, such as InfiniBox, Infinibox SSA, InfiniGuard, and InfuzeOS.
item.dc:creator: Network World
